subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the stone sidewalk curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing a white short-sleeve t-shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual continental attire with slim trousers and canvas shoes; the bold stop sign graphic dominates the shirt's front, warmly lit by the low morning sun.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: White short-sleeve t-shirt with a printed red stop sign, slim dark trousers, tan canvas shoes.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair skin tone with a smooth complexion, warmly lit by golden-hour light.
subjects.facial_features: Short light-brown hair, light eyes, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: A tree-lined boulevard in a European old-town district under a clear golden-hour spring morning. The asphalt carriageway is edged with cobblestone gutters and narrow stone sidewalks, flanked by stucco townhouses with shuttered windows, blooming street trees, wrought-iron lamp posts, and a few parked cars. Warm low sunlight rakes down the street; distant pedestrians and cyclists appear faintly, conveying a calm early-morning old-town scene.

lighting.direction: Low sun from the east, front-and-side-lighting the pedestrian with a warm glow.
lighting.shadows: Long shadows stretch across the cobblestone-edged road away from the low sun; the pedestrian's front stays warmly lit.
lighting.illumination_effect: Soft warm golden illumination with gentle contrast; the stop sign shirt graphic stays clearly legible in the morning light.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective down the tree-lined boulevard, the pedestrian on the right stone sidewalk; the cobblestone-edged lane and long shadows lead toward the vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm golden light on stucco facades and blossom, cool blue shadow pools on cobblestones, with the red stop sign on the white shirt as a vivid focal accent.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating tree trunks, blossom canopy, cobblestone gutters, and evenly spaced iron lamp posts.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus across the road scene, with the pedestrian remaining clearly resolved as the car approaches.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario on a European old-town boulevard at golden hour demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along the tree-lined old-town boulevard in warm golden-hour light; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right stone sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the curb amid long morning shadows.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed over the cobblestone-edged asphalt; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on cobblestone-edged asphalt under warm golden-hour morning sun, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right stone curb whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches; long shadows stretch across the road and vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the stone curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a golden-lit European old-town boulevard with cobblestone gutters and blooming trees, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right stone sidewalk facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their white shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the curb amid long morning shadows. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the boulevard continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient quiet-morning driving sounds: a steady engine hum, tire noise over cobblestone-edged asphalt, faint birdsong, and distant early traffic. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
